name: DTP 請求計算アプリ
description: DTPオペレーター向けの請求計算ツール - ページ単価別に計算し、源泉徴収も自動計算

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 192 192'><defs><linearGradient id='grad' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' style='stop-color:%23667eea;stop-opacity:1' /><stop offset='100%' style='stop-color:%23764ba2;stop-opacity:1' /></linearGradient></defs><rect fill='url(%23grad)' width='192' height='192' rx='45'/><text x='96' y='96' font-size='100' font-weight='bold' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>¥</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512'><defs><linearGradient id='grad' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' style='stop-color:%23667eea;stop-opacity:1' /><stop offset='100%' style='stop-color:%23764ba2;stop-opacity:1' /></linearGradient></defs><rect fill='url(%23grad)' width='512' height='512' rx='120'/><text x='256' y='256' font-size='280' font-weight='bold' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>¥</text></svg>

screenshots.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 540 720'><rect fill='white' width='540' height='720'/><rect fill='%23667eea' width='540' height='120'/><text x='270' y='70' font-size='36' font-weight='bold' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>DTP 請求計算</text><text x='270' y='150' font-size='20' fill='%23555' text-anchor='middle'>項目別計算機</text><rect x='30' y='200' width='480' height='100' fill='%23f0f0f0' rx='8'/><text x='270' y='250' font-size='16' fill='%23333' text-anchor='middle'>ページ単価を入力</text><rect x='30' y='320' width='480' height='100' fill='%23667eea' rx='8'/><text x='270' y='370' font-size='18' fill='white' text-anchor='middle'>実際の入金額: ¥0</text><text x='270' y='400' font-size='14' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' opacity='0.9'>源泉徴収考慮済み</text></svg>
